sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: iShares Core S&P Total U.S. Stock Market ETF ETF Price, Holdings, & News (NYSEARCA:ITOT)
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive information on the iShares Core S&P Total U.S. Stock Market ETF (ITOT), including its current price, key statistics, holdings, news, and fund details. The ETF, managed by BlackRock and launched in 2004, tracks a market cap-weighted index of all common equities on the NYSE and NASDAQ. It also lists its top 10 holdings, such as NVIDIA, Apple, and Microsoft, and offers recent news headlines related to the ETF's performance and comparisons with other funds.

feed.title: MPSC won't reconsider DTE agreement to power massive data center
feed.summary: The Michigan Public Service Commission (MPSC) has unanimously voted against reconsidering energy contracts for a large-scale data center campus in Saline Township, stating that opposed groups lacked standing. The project, involving Oracle and Related Digital, aims to power OpenAI's "Stargate" initiative and requires 1.4 gigawatts of energy. Attorney General Dana Nessel's office and environmental groups had challenged the contracts, citing concerns about residential electricity rates.

feed.title: Is It Time To Revisit Bio-Techne (TECH) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: Bio-Techne (TECH) has experienced significant share price weakness, with declines over the past week, month, and year. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 29.1%. However, its current P/E ratio of 98.34x is considerably higher than the industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio, indicating it is overvalued on that metric.

feed.title: SLB (SLB) Is Up 14.7% After Expanding NVIDIA AI Deal And Winning Kaiping 18-1 Contract – Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: SLB has expanded its collaboration with NVIDIA to develop AI infrastructure for the energy sector and secured a significant 20-well subsea production contract for the Kaiping 18-1 field. These developments align with SLB's strategy to balance oilfield services with digital and offshore solutions. While near-term guidance remains soft and global spending uncertainty persists, these moves could reshape SLB's investment narrative towards digital growth and operational efficiency, although increased R&D costs could impact margins if revenue growth doesn't keep pace.

feed.title: General Motors Stock: Navigating Electric Vehicle Shift and Profitability in a Competitive Auto Land
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) shares offer North American investors exposure to the evolving auto industry, balancing traditional strengths with significant investments in electric vehicles (EVs) and autonomous driving. The company leverages its dominant position in trucks and SUVs to fund its electrification strategy, focusing on the Ultium battery platform and Cruise autonomous unit. Analysts project continued profitability for GM, with upcoming earnings on April 28, 2026, expected to provide further clarity on its EV progress and financial guidance.

feed.title: The Progressive Corp Stock: Solid Insurance Leader with Hold Consensus and Growth in Policies Amid Rising Costs
feed.summary: The Progressive Corp (NYSE:PGR) demonstrates resilient growth in policies, with 39.2 million in force, despite facing increased underwriting costs and a rising combined ratio. Analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus with an average price target of $270.40, acknowledging growth prospects balanced against sector challenges like claims inflation and regulatory scrutiny. The company leverages technology and its direct-to-consumer model to sustain market share and diversify revenue streams, making it an appealing prospect for long-term investors.

feed.title: IAMGOLD Corp Stock: Gold Producer's Strategic Assets and Path to Sustainable Production Growth
feed.summary: IAMGOLD Corp is a mid-tier gold producer with strategic assets in North America and West Africa, focusing on sustainable production growth, notably through its flagship Côté Gold mine in Ontario. The company aims to leverage its high-quality assets to generate free cash flow and increase output, providing North American investors with exposure to gold price cycles and operational leverage. IAMGOLD emphasizes responsible mining practices, portfolio optimization, and exploration to extend mine lives, while managing risks such as geopolitical issues and gold price volatility.

feed.title: Walgreens, Wells Fargo among major companies to report layoffs in Illinois
feed.summary: Several major companies, including Walgreens, Wells Fargo, H&M, Trelleborg, Treehouse Private Brands, Panera, and First Brands Group, announced significant layoffs and facility closures in Illinois during February, impacting thousands of workers across various sectors. These announcements were made under the Illinois Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) Act. While most involve job losses due to restructuring or closures, one case involving Franciscan Health transitioning to Prime Healthcare represents a change in employment entity rather than actual layoffs, with Prime Healthcare planning to offer positions to most current staff.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Acquires 291,714 Shares of Jefferies Financial Group Inc. $JEF

feed.title: Aurora Mobile partners with Soochow Securities for push service By Investing.com
feed.summary: Aurora Mobile has partnered with Soochow Securities to provide its JPush notification technology for the securities firm's mobile platform, Dongwu Xiucai app, as part of Soochow Securities' digital transformation. The JPush solution supports multiple operating systems and integrates with various system-level and device manufacturer channels, enabling targeted delivery of business notifications, market alerts, and compliance announcements based on user profiling. Aurora Mobile, despite a recent stock decline, generated $53.6 million in revenue with 18.6% growth and a 67.2% gross profit margin, and has recently achieved its first full-year GAAP net profit and expanded into Japan.
